detail.description: Orlando Arcia doubles (1) on a ground ball to left fielder Jarren Duran.
Orlando Arcia singles on a line drive to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela.
Orlando Arcia singles on a line drive to right fielder Wilyer Abreu.
Orlando Arcia singles on a ground ball to shortstop Isiah Kiner-Falefa, deflected by pitcher Brayan Bello. Austin Martin scores. Josh Bell to 2nd.
Orlando Arcia singles on a ground ball to left fielder Jarren Duran.
Orlando Arcia homers (1) on a fly ball to left field.
Orlando Arcia singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Kyle Isbel.
Orlando Arcia singles on a line drive to right fielder Jac Caglianone. Josh Bell scores. Orlando Arcia to 2nd. Throwing error by right fielder Jac Caglianone.
Orlando Arcia singles on a line drive to right fielder Cam Smith.
Orlando Arcia singles on a line drive to right fielder Rikuu Nishida. Kody Clemens out at home on the throw, right fielder Rikuu Nishida to catcher Drew Romo.
Orlando Arcia singles on a ground ball to center fielder Tristan Peters.
Orlando Arcia singles on a ground ball to shortstop Zach McKinstry. Brooks Lee to 2nd.
Orlando Arcia singles on a ground ball to center fielder Oneil Cruz.
